# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: mynamespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: myserviceaccount
  namespace: mynamespace

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  namespace: mynamespace
  name: my-service
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myservice
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  namespace: mynamespace
  name: my-service-auth
spec:
  server:
    name: my-service
  client:
    meshTLS: 
      identities:
      - default.default.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local
